MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Quidachay: Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation is present, represented by Terrell Williams
Attorney Richard Carrington for the plaintiff.
Defendants Dale Ludd and Bonnie Ludd are present.
Attorney Ashleigh Musser appearing for defendant Bonnie Ludd in limited scope.
Attorney Jason Cinq-Mars appearing for defendant Dale Ludd in limited scope.

The Judge, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of May 16, 2016 remains on calendar.
